free_text: EWA reactor at the INR, Swierk
U-235 oxide deposited target on a 4.5 mg/cm2 Ni foil.
Target thickness was 0.25 mg/cm2 for all angles except
for the extreme ones with a 1 mg/cm2 target.
consists of a surface-barrier delta-E detector (50 um
thick) and a Si(Li) E-detector (1.8 mm thick).
A rectangular surface-barrier detector with low
resistivity silicon, for detection of FF.
Polar LRA emission cross section: 27+/-4 mb

as well as in the delta-E detector and computer program
